center.name: 阿爾哥亞灣
center.summary: 阿爾哥亞灣是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Fynbos buttonquail、南非企鹅，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: left|thumb|In natural habitat The species is endemic to South Africa and is found along the south coast from Cape Town to Algoa Bay in Eastern Cape province where it occurs in mountain fynbos where vegetation is relatively sparse. A 1994 survey resulted in an estimate of c.310-420 birds in of montane fynbos habitat in Cape of Good Hope Nature Reserve

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African penguin is found on the southern and southwestern coast of Africa, living in colonies on 27 islands between Namibia and Algoa Bay, near Port Elizabeth, South Africa. It is the only penguin species that breeds in Africa, and its presence gave name to the Penguin Islands
